title: Block HightlightFX
description: A simple visual mod that spices up your game with custom colorful block highlights and outlines!
body:
A simple visual mod that spices up your game with custom colorful block highlights/outlines! 

# Features:
 - Change the color & opacity of the vanilla block outline
 - Highlight blocks with a custom color & opacity
 - Display the block outline/fill while not looking at a block
 - Display a full-sized block outline/fill even when looking at a smaller block


 Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/7a5KPXHaY4) for updates and to report bugs!
